findings.title: Operator precedence bug in system:authenticated guard allows bypassing admin group protection
findings.evidence: In bindRole(), the condition if roleName == admingroup-role && e == system:authenticated || e == '' has an operator precedence issue. Due to && binding tighter than ||, system:authenticated filtering only applies to admingroup-role. CRD CEL validation provides first line of defense but this controller-level guard is last line of defense.

findings.title: Self-signed certificate generated as CA with overly permissive key usage enables certificate forgery
findings.evidence: generateCertificate() sets IsCA: true and KeyUsageCertSign on server TLS cert. If private key is compromised, attacker could sign arbitrary certificates trusted by anything trusting this cert. Certificate stored in Kubernetes Secret.

findings.title: Fallback container image uses :latest tag from personal repository
findings.evidence: getKubeAuthProxyImage() falls back to quay.io/jtanner/kube-auth-proxy:latest when env var unset. Mutable tag from personal repo with no runtime guard preventing production use.

findings.title: OAuth scope user:full grants excessive permissions to gateway OAuth client
findings.evidence: OpenShiftOAuthScope set to user:full granting full API access. Standard OpenShift practice but broader than necessary. Server-side only, not exposed to clients.

findings.title: Secret values written to YAML config files on disk via string substitution
findings.evidence: configureAlertManager() writes SNITCH_URL, PAGERDUTY_KEY, SMTP credentials to alertmanager-configs.yaml via common.ReplaceStringsInFile(). Plaintext credentials on filesystem.

findings.title: Gateway listener allows routes from all namespaces with no restrictions
findings.evidence: CreateListeners() uses NamespacesFromAll in AllowedRoutes. Any namespace can create HTTPRoutes attaching to this gateway. Security depends on RBAC for HTTPRoute creation.

findings.title: Unchecked array index access on ClusterVersion History could panic
findings.evidence: getOCPVersion() accesses clusterVersion.Status.History[0].Version without bounds check. Empty History during cluster bootstrap causes panic, crashing operator.

findings.title: GenerateRandomHex produces half expected entropy due to integer division
findings.evidence: GenerateRandomHex() computes numBytes := length / 2. Called with length=32, generates 16 bytes (128 bits). Function name and semantics are misleading.

findings.title: OAuth client created with GrantHandlerAuto enables silent consent bypass
findings.evidence: OAuthClient created with GrantMethod: oauthv1.GrantHandlerAuto. Combined with user:full scope, any user clicking a gateway link automatically grants full access without consent screen. Removes last user-visible warning in OAuth phishing scenarios.
